questions.q: Which late-night comedian was announced on May 12, 2026, to be returning to host the 2027 Oscars for the third consecutive year?
At the opening ceremony of the 2026 Cannes Film Festival, director Peter Jackson received an honorary Palme d'Or presented by which actor?
Which actor, best known for playing the brutish Ogre in the 'Revenge of the Nerds' films and Ray Jackson in 'Bloodsport,' passed away at age 71 on May 12, 2026?
During Disney's upfront presentation in May 2026, it was announced that James Cameron's 'Avatar: Fire and Ash' will make its streaming debut on June 24 on which platform?
Barry Blaustein, who passed away at 72 on May 12, 2026, was known for writing Eddie Murphy films and directing which acclaimed 1999 professional wrestling documentary?
options: The Resurrection of Jake the Snake
